lesson.subtitle: Aula 3 — Speaking About People You Know — Describing Others and Building Connection
lesson.title_tag: Professor View — Vanessa Giuriati | Aula 3 — Speaking About People You Know

listenings.text: Let me tell you about my favorite colleague, Marco. He is one of the most reliable people I know. He always arrives on time, and he never forgets a deadline. The thing about Marco is that he is very patient. When a new person joins the team, he is always supportive and he helps them learn. He is quite direct in meetings, so you always know what he thinks. But he can also be very thoughtful. Last week, he stayed late to help me finish a report. To be honest, I would say he is the heart of our team.

I want to describe my younger sister, Bia. She is the most creative person in my family. She paints, she writes, and she always has a new idea. The thing about Bia is that she is very outgoing. She loves to meet new people, and she talks to everyone at a party. She is not shy at all. I am more of a quiet person, so we are quite different. But she is also very hardworking. She studies design, and she works on her projects every single day. I would say she is easygoing, but she never gives up on the things she loves.

extra_audio.text: First, this is my colleague, Marco. Second, he is very reliable and patient. Third, he usually arrives early and helps the team. Fourth, he is direct in meetings, but he is also thoughtful. Fifth, to be honest, I would say he is the best person on our team.
